reasoning: This appears to be a LapSim training demonstration showing the peg transfer setup and some object manipulation, but not a timed performance attempt. The video shows yellow rings being moved between pegs but lacks clear timing start/end points and completion markers. The presence of instructional text and the format suggest this is educational content rather than a scored performance.
